        Out_(Num) = 1

        If Out_(0) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 1
        If Out_(1) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 2
        If Out_(2) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 4
        If Out_(3) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 8

        Dim vBwdStartAmp As String = srclbReclBwdStartAmpVal.Text
        Dim vBwdStartNoise As String = srclbReclBwdStartNoiseVal.Text

        Dim vFwdMoveAmp As String = srclbReclFwdMovingAmpVal.Text
        Dim vFwdMoveNoise As String = srclbReclFwdMovingNoiseVal.Text
        Dim vBwdMoveAmp As String = srclbReclBwdMovingAmpVal.Text
        Dim vBwdMoveNoise As String = srclbReclBwdMovingNoiseVal.Text

        Dim vFwdAngle As String = srclbReclFwdAngleVal.Text
        Dim vFwdSpeed As String = srclbReclFwdSpeedVal.Text
        Dim vBwdAngle As String = srclbReclBwdAngleVal.Text
        Dim vBwdSpeed As String = srclbReclBwdSpeedVal.Text

        Dim vEndAngle As String = srclbReclEndAngleVal.Text
        Dim vDecision As String = srcLbTotalDec.Text
        Dim WorkerDec As String = srclbWorkerDec.Text

        ' UPDATE SQL 조립
        Dim sb As New System.Text.StringBuilder()
        sb.AppendLine("UPDATE TABLE_MAIN SET ")
        sb.AppendLine("    Test_Date = " & SqlQ(vTestDate) & ",")
        sb.AppendLine("    Test_StartTime = " & SqlQ(vStartTime) & ",")
        sb.AppendLine("    Test_EndTime = " & SqlQ(vEndTime) & ",")
        sb.AppendLine("    Test_Recl_Starting_FwdAmp = " & SqlQ(vFwdStartAmp) & ",")
        sb.AppendLine("    Test_Recl_Starting_FwdNoise = " & SqlQ(vFwdStartNoise) & ",")
        sb.AppendLine("    Test_Recl_Starting_BwdAmp = " & SqlQ(vBwdStartAmp) & ",")
        sb.AppendLine("    Test_Recl_Starting_BwdNoise = " & SqlQ(vBwdStartNoise) & ",")
        sb.AppendLine("    Test_Recl_Moving_FwdAmp = " & SqlQ(vFwdMoveAmp) & ",")
        sb.AppendLine("    Test_Recl_Moving_FwdNoise = " & SqlQ(vFwdMoveNoise) & ",")
        sb.AppendLine("    Test_Recl_Moving_BwdAmp = " & SqlQ(vBwdMoveAmp) & ",")
        sb.AppendLine("    Test_Recl_Moving_BwdNoise = " & SqlQ(vBwdMoveNoise) & ",")
        sb.AppendLine("    Test_Recl_FwdAngle = " & SqlQ(vFwdAngle) & ",")
        sb.AppendLine("    Test_Recl_FwdSpeed = " & SqlQ(vFwdSpeed) & ",")
        sb.AppendLine("    Test_Recl_BwdAngle = " & SqlQ(vBwdAngle) & ",")
        sb.AppendLine("    Test_Recl_BwdSpeed = " & SqlQ(vBwdSpeed) & ",")
        sb.AppendLine("    Test_Recl_EndAngle = " & SqlQ(vEndAngle) & ",")
        sb.AppendLine("    Test_Worker_Decision = " & SqlQ(WorkerDec) & ",")
        sb.AppendLine("    Test_Decision = " & SqlQ(vDecision))
        sb.AppendLine("WHERE SerialNo = " & SqlQ(serialNo) & ";")

        Dim strSQL As String = sb.ToString()

        Try
            ConnectionOpenSQL()
            Appendlog("Query: " & strSQL)
            SqlConnect.Execute(strSQL)
            Appendlog("UPDATE OK (SerialNo=" & serialNo & ")")
        Catch ex As Exception
            Appendlog("UpdateSQLDBNG 오류: " & ex.Message)
        Finally
            ConnectionCloseSQL()
        End Try

        wStep = NextSTep

    End Sub

            OptionPos2 = RemoveAllWhiteSpace(Rs.Fields("Pos2").Value)

            TmpTypeMonitor = If(IsDBNull(Rs.Fields("type_MONITOR").Value), False, CBool(Rs.Fields("type_MONITOR").Value))
            TmpTypeFrest = If(IsDBNull(Rs.Fields("type_FREST").Value), False, CBool(Rs.Fields("type_FREST").Value))

            TargetBoltColorLeft = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("TargetBoltColorLeft").Value).ToUpper().Trim()

    Private Sub ConnectPlc()
        'CPU_Q04UDVCPU 210 0xD2 Q04UDVCPU
        ActPlc.ActCpuType = 210
        ActPlc.ActHostAddress = PlcIpAddress
        If ActPlc.Open <> 0 Then
            FlagPlcConnection = False
            Appendlog("ConnectPLc Fail")
        Else
            Appendlog("ConnectPLc Success")
            FlagPlcConnection = True
        End If

    End Sub
    Private Sub ReadPlcMelsec(ByVal startInAddress As Integer, ByVal InDataNumber As Integer,
                          ByVal startOutAddress As Integer, ByVal OutDataNumber As Integer)

        Dim i As Integer
        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              ' Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         ' List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short         ' Data for 'DeviceValue'
        Dim szarrData() As String               ' Array for 'Data'
        Dim iNumber As Integer                  ' Loop counter
        Dim Arrysize As Integer = InDataNumber + OutDataNumber

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Arrysize - 1)
        ReDim szarrData(Arrysize - 1)

        ' 입력 주소 문자열 구성
        For i = 0 To InDataNumber - 1
            szDeviceName &= "D" & CStr(startInAddress + i) & vbLf
        Next
        ' 출력 주소 문자열 구성
        For i = 0 To OutDataNumber - 1
            If i = OutDataNumber - 1 Then
                szDeviceName &= "D" & CStr(startOutAddress + i)
            Else
                szDeviceName &= "D" & CStr(startOutAddress + i) & vbLf
            End If
        Next

        Try
            Try
                iReturnCode = ActPlc.ReadDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Arrysize, sharrDeviceValue(0))
            Catch exException As Exception
                ' Exception processing
                MessageBox.Show(exException.Message, Name, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
                Exit Sub
            End Try

            ' When the ReadDeviceRandom2 method is succeeded
            If iReturnCode = 0 Then
                ' Copy the read data to the 'szarrData'
                For iNumber = 0 To Arrysize - 1
                    szarrData(iNumber) = sharrDeviceValue(iNumber).ToString()
                Next iNumber

                ' 입력 영역 저장
                For i = 0 To InDataNumber - 1
                    Dim wordVal As Integer = sharrDeviceValue(i)
                    PlcInput(i + startInAddress) = wordVal
                    ' 비트 분리
                    For b As Integer = 0 To 15
                        PlcInputBit(i + startInAddress, b) = ((wordVal >> b) And 1) = 1
                    Next
                Next

                ' 출력 영역 저장
                For i = 0 To OutDataNumber - 1
                    Dim wordVal As Integer = sharrDeviceValue(i + InDataNumber)
                    PlcInput(i + startOutAddress) = wordVal
                    ' 비트 분리
                    For b As Integer = 0 To 15
                        PlcInputBit(i + startOutAddress, b) = ((wordVal >> b) And 1) = 1
                    Next
                Next

                PlcConnectionError = "OK"
            Else
                PlcConnectionError = Dec2Hex(iReturnCode)
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            '필요하면 로깅
        End Try

    End Sub
    Private Sub WritePlcMelsec(ByVal strChr As String, ByVal StartArry As String, ByVal ArryMessage As String)

        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short          'Data for 'DeviceValue'

        If PlcConnectionError = "OK" Then

            ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Len(ArryMessage))

            For i As Integer = 0 To Len(ArryMessage) - 1
                szDeviceName = szDeviceName & strChr & Format((Int(StartArry) + i), "00000")
                'If i <> Len(ArryMessage - 1) Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName + ControlChars.Lf
                If i < Len(ArryMessage) - 1 Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName & ControlChars.Lf
                sharrDeviceValue(i) = Mid(ArryMessage, i + 1, 1)
            Next
            Try
                iReturnCode = ActPlc.WriteDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Len(ArryMessage), sharrDeviceValue(0))
            Catch exception As Exception
                'Exception processing
                'MessageBox.Show(exception.Message, Text, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
                FlagPlcConnection = False
                Exit Sub
            End Try

        End If

        'The return code of the method Is displayed by the hexadecimal.
        'txt_ReturnCode.Text = String.Format("0x{0:x8} [HEX]", iReturnCode)

    End Sub
    Public Sub WritePlcBit(ByVal strChr As String,
                        ByVal wordAddress As Integer,
                        ByVal bitIndex As Integer,
                        ByVal setOn As Boolean)

        If bitIndex < 0 OrElse bitIndex > 15 Then
            Appendlog($"WritePlcBit: bitIndex 범위 오류 ({bitIndex})")
            Exit Sub
        End If

        If PlcConnectionError <> "OK" Then
            Appendlog("WritePlcBit: PLC 연결 상태가 OK가 아닙니다.")
            Exit Sub
        End If

        Dim iReturnCode As Integer
        Dim szDeviceName As String = strChr & Format(wordAddress, "00000")
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short = New Short(0) {}

        Try
            ' 1) 현재 워드 읽기
            iReturnCode = ActPlc.ReadDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, 1, sharrDeviceValue(0))
            If iReturnCode <> 0 Then
                PlcConnectionError = Dec2Hex(iReturnCode)
                Appendlog($"WritePlcBit: Read 실패 RC=0x{PlcConnectionError}")
                Exit Sub
            End If

            ' 2) 비트 수정
            Dim wordVal As Integer = CInt(sharrDeviceValue(0)) And &HFFFF
            Dim mask As Integer = (1 << bitIndex)
            If setOn Then
                wordVal = wordVal Or mask
            Else
                wordVal = wordVal And Not mask
            End If
            sharrDeviceValue(0) = CShort(wordVal And &HFFFF)
            'Appendlog($"DeviceValue : [{sharrDeviceValue(0).ToString}]")

            ' 3) 되쓰기
            iReturnCode = ActPlc.WriteDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, 1, sharrDeviceValue(0))
            If iReturnCode = 0 Then
                PlcConnectionError = "OK"
                'Appendlog($"WritePlcBit: Write 성공[{wordAddress.ToString}][{bitIndex.ToString}][{setOn.ToString}]")
            Else
                PlcConnectionError = Dec2Hex(iReturnCode)
                Appendlog($"WritePlcBit: Write 실패 RC=0x{PlcConnectionError}")
            End If

        Catch ex As Exception
            Appendlog($"WritePlcBit 예외: {ex.Message}")
        End Try
    End Sub
    Private Sub WritePlcBits(ByVal strChr As String,
                         ByVal wordAddress As Integer,
                         ByVal bit As Boolean)

        If PlcConnectionError <> "OK" Then
            Appendlog("WritePlcBits: PLC 연결 상태가 OK가 아닙니다.") ' 필요시 Appendlog 로 바꾸세요
            Exit Sub
        End If

        Dim szDeviceName As String = strChr & Format(wordAddress, "00000")
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short = New Short(0) {}

        ' True면 0xFFFF(-1), False면 0x0000
        Dim val As UShort = If(bit, UShort.MaxValue, CUShort(0))
        sharrDeviceValue(0) = CShort(val)  ' MX는 Short로 전달

        Try
            Dim rc As Integer = ActPlc.WriteDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, 1, sharrDeviceValue(0))
            If rc = 0 Then
                PlcConnectionError = "OK"
            Else
                PlcConnectionError = Dec2Hex(rc)
                Appendlog($"WritePlcBits: Write 실패 RC=0x{PlcConnectionError}")
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            Appendlog($"WritePlcBits 예외: {ex.Message}")
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private first As Boolean = True
    Private Sub TimerPlcConnect_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles TimerPlcConnect.Tick

        If PlcConnectionError = "OK" Then
            AxcPlcErr.BackColor = Color.DarkBlue
            If first = True Then
                WritePlcBits("D", PlcOutSignalStartAddress, False)
                WritePlcBits("D", PlcOutSignalStartAddress + 1, False)
                first = False
            End If
        Else
            AxcPlcErr.BackColor = Color.DarkRed
        End If

        If PlcConnectionStep = 0 Then
            ConnectPlc()
            PlcConnectionStep = 2
        ElseIf PlcConnectionStep = 2 Then
            If FlagPlcConnection = True Then
                PlcConnectionStep = 3
            Else
                PlcConnectionStep = 0
            End If
        ElseIf PlcConnectionStep = 3 Then
            PlcConnectionError = ""
            ReadPlcMelsec(PlcInSignalStartAddress, 3, PlcOutSignalStartAddress, 2)
            PlcConnectionStep = 4
        ElseIf PlcConnectionStep = 4 Then
            If PlcConnectionError <> "" Then
                If PlcConnectionError = "OK" Then
                    PlcConnectionStep = 2
                Else
                    ActPlc.Close()
                    PlcConnectionStep = 0
                End If
            End If
        End If

    End Sub

    Private RequestStep1 As Integer
    Private RequestStep2 As Integer
    Private RequestCount1 As Double
    Private RequestCount2 As Double
    Private ValueVolt1 As Double
    Private ValueAmp1 As Double
    Private ValueVolt2 As Double
    Private ValueAmp2 As Double
    Private Sub TmrIO_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles TmrIO.Tick

        Dim err1 As ErrorCode = ErrorCode.Success
        Dim err2 As ErrorCode = ErrorCode.Success
        Dim tmp1 As Byte
        Dim tmp2 As Byte

        err1 = InstantDiCtrl1.Read(0, tmp1)
        err2 = InstantDiCtrl1.Read(1, tmp2)

        Dec2Bin(CInt(tmp1), CInt(tmp2))

        LbRequestStep1.Text = RequestStep1
        RequestCount1 = RequestCount1 + 0.1
        If RequestCount1 >= 2 Then
            RequestStep1 = 0
            RequestCount1 = 0
        End If
        If RequestStep1 = 0 Then
            RequestSupply(SerialSupply1, "MEAS:VOLT?")
            RequestStep1 = 1
        ElseIf RequestStep1 = 1 Then
            'if data Recv VOLT
        ElseIf RequestStep1 = 2 Then
            RequestSupply(SerialSupply1, "MEAS:CURR?")
            RequestStep1 = 3
        ElseIf RequestStep1 = 4 Then
            RequestSupply(SerialSupply1, "SOURS:VOLT " & CStr(TargetVolt1))
            RequestStep1 = 0
        End If

        lbSupply1Volt.Text = ValueVolt1
        lbSupply1Amp.Text = ValueAmp1

        LbRequestStep2.Text = RequestStep2
        RequestCount2 = RequestCount2 + 0.1
        If RequestCount2 >= 2 Then
            RequestStep2 = 0
            RequestCount2 = 0
        End If
        If RequestStep2 = 0 Then
            RequestSupply(SerialSupply2, "MEAS:VOLT?")
            RequestStep2 = 1
        ElseIf RequestStep2 = 1 Then
            'if data Recv VOLT
        ElseIf RequestStep2 = 2 Then
            RequestSupply(SerialSupply2, "MEAS:CURR?")
            RequestStep2 = 3
        ElseIf RequestStep2 = 4 Then
            RequestSupply(SerialSupply2, "SOURS:VOLT " & CStr(TargetVolt2))
            RequestStep2 = 0
        End If

        lbSupply2Volt.Text = ValueVolt2
        lbSupply2Amp.Text = ValueAmp2

    End Sub

    Private TargetVolt1 As String
    Private TargetVolt2 As String

    Public Sub Dec2Bin(ByVal Port_0 As Integer, ByVal Port_1 As Integer)

        Dim iten As Integer
        Dim sbin As String
        Dim tmp As String
        Dim i As Integer

        iten = CInt(Port_0)
        sbin = ""
        Do Until iten = 0
            sbin = CStr((iten Mod 2)) & sbin
            iten = iten \ 2
        Loop

        tmp = ""
        For i = 1 To 8 - Len(sbin)
            tmp = tmp & "0"
        Next

        IoBoardInput(0) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 8, 1))
        IoBoardInput(1) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 7, 1))
        IoBoardInput(2) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 6, 1))
        IoBoardInput(3) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 5, 1))
        IoBoardInput(4) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 4, 1))
        IoBoardInput(5) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 3, 1))
        IoBoardInput(6) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 2, 1))
        IoBoardInput(7) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 1, 1))

        iten = CInt(Port_1)
        sbin = ""
        Do Until iten = 0
            sbin = CStr((iten Mod 2)) & sbin
            iten = iten \ 2

        Loop

        tmp = ""
        For i = 1 To 8 - Len(sbin)
            tmp = tmp & "0"
        Next

        IoBoardInput(8) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 8, 1))
        IoBoardInput(9) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 7, 1))
        IoBoardInput(10) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 6, 1))
        IoBoardInput(11) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 5, 1))
        IoBoardInput(12) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 4, 1))
        IoBoardInput(13) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 3, 1))
        IoBoardInput(14) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 2, 1))
        IoBoardInput(15) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 1, 1))

        For i = 0 To 15
            If IoBoardInput(i) = 1 Then
                IoBoardInput(i) = 0
            Else
                IoBoardInput(i) = 1
            End If
        Next

    End Sub
    Private Sub RequestSupply(ByVal SupplyPort As System.IO.Ports.SerialPort, ByVal strMsg As String)

        Try
            If SupplyPort.IsOpen = True Then
                SupplyPort.WriteLine(strMsg)
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try

    End Sub
    Private Sub SerialSupply1_DataReceived(sender As Object, e As SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles SerialSupply1.DataReceived
        Try
            Dim RecvData As String = SerialSupply1.ReadExisting()
            Buffer1 = Buffer1 & RecvData
            If Buffer1.Contains(Chr(13)) = True Then 'ETX
                If RequestStep1 = 1 Then
                    ValueVolt1 = CDbl(Format(CDbl(Mid(Buffer1, 1, Len(Buffer1) - 1)), "#0.0#"))
                    RequestStep1 = 2
                ElseIf RequestStep1 = 3 Then
                    ValueAmp1 = CDbl(Format(CDbl(Mid(Buffer1, 1, Len(Buffer1) - 1)), "#0.0#"))
                    RequestStep1 = 4
                End If
                Buffer1 = ""
                SerialSupply1.DiscardInBuffer()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
    End Sub
    Private Sub SerialSupply2_DataReceived(sender As Object, e As SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles SerialSupply2.DataReceived
        Try
            Dim RecvData As String = SerialSupply2.ReadExisting()
            Buffer2 = Buffer2 & RecvData
            If Buffer2.Contains(Chr(13)) = True Then 'ETX
                If RequestStep2 = 1 Then
                    ValueVolt2 = CDbl(Format(CDbl(Mid(Buffer2, 1, Len(Buffer2) - 1)), "#0.0#"))
                    RequestStep2 = 2
                ElseIf RequestStep2 = 3 Then
                    ValueAmp2 = CDbl(Format(CDbl(Mid(Buffer2, 1, Len(Buffer2) - 1)), "#0.0#"))
                    RequestStep2 = 4
                End If
                Buffer2 = ""
                SerialSupply2.DiscardInBuffer()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
    End Sub

#End Region

#Region "NI DAQMX"

    Private myTask As Task  'Main Task which is Assigned when the Start Button is Clicked
    Private runningTask As Task
    Private data As AnalogWaveform(Of Double)()
    Private analogInReader As AnalogMultiChannelReader
    Private analogCallback As AsyncCallback
    Private dataColumn As DataColumn()
    Private dataTable As DataTable = New DataTable

    Private Sub AnalogInCallback(ByVal ar As IAsyncResult)
        Try
            If (Not (runningTask Is Nothing)) AndAlso runningTask Is ar.AsyncState Then
                data = analogInReader.EndReadWaveform(ar)
                dataToDataTable(data, dataTable)
                analogInReader.BeginMemoryOptimizedReadWaveform(100, analogCallback, myTask, data)
            End If
        Catch ex As DaqException
            MessageBox.Show(ex.Message)
            runningTask = Nothing
            myTask.Dispose()
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private ValueNoise As Double
    Private ValueLaser As Double
    Private Sub dataToDataTable(ByVal sourceArray As AnalogWaveform(Of Double)(), ByRef dataTable As DataTable)

        Dim currentLineIndex As Integer = 0
        Dim Ch1AvrCOunt As Double = 0
        Dim Ch1AvrSUm As Double = 0
        Dim Ch2AvrCOunt As Double = 0
        Dim Ch2AvrSUm As Double = 0

        For Each waveform As AnalogWaveform(Of Double) In sourceArray
            Dim dataCount As Integer = 0
            If waveform.Samples.Count < 10 Then
                dataCount = waveform.Samples.Count
            Else
                dataCount = 10
            End If

            For sample As Integer = 0 To (dataCount - 1)
                dataTable.Rows(sample)(currentLineIndex) = waveform.Samples(sample).Value
                If currentLineIndex = 0 Then
                    Ch1AvrSUm = Ch1AvrSUm + waveform.Samples(sample).Value
                    Ch1AvrCOunt = Ch1AvrCOunt + 1
                ElseIf currentLineIndex = 1 Then
                    Ch2AvrSUm = Ch2AvrSUm + waveform.Samples(sample).Value
                    Ch2AvrCOunt = Ch2AvrCOunt + 1
                End If
            Next
            currentLineIndex += 1
        Next
        ValueNoise = CDbl(Format((Ch1AvrSUm / Ch1AvrCOunt * 100), "#0.0#")) + BasicNoiseTol
        ValueLaser = CDbl(Format(((Ch2AvrSUm / Ch2AvrCOunt) * 50) + 50, "#0.0#"))

        srclbNoise.Text = ValueNoise.ToString()
        srclbLaser.Text = ValueLaser.ToString()

    End Sub

    Public Sub InitializeDataTable(ByVal channelCollection As AIChannelCollection, ByRef data As DataTable)
        Dim numOfChannels As Int16 = channelCollection.Count
        data.Rows.Clear()
        data.Columns.Clear()
        dataColumn = New DataColumn(numOfChannels) {}
        Dim numOfRows As Int16 = 10
        Dim currentChannelIndex As Int16 = 0
        Dim currentDataIndex As Int16 = 0
        For currentChannelIndex = 0 To (numOfChannels - 1)
            dataColumn(currentChannelIndex) = New DataColumn
            dataColumn(currentChannelIndex).DataType = System.Type.GetType("System.Double")
            dataColumn(currentChannelIndex).ColumnName = channelCollection(currentChannelIndex).PhysicalName
        Next
        data.Columns.AddRange(dataColumn)
        For currentDataIndex = 0 To (numOfRows - 1)
            Dim rowArr As Object() = New Object(numOfChannels - 1) {}
            data.Rows.Add(rowArr)
        Next
    End Sub

    Private Sub DaqStart()

        If runningTask Is Nothing Then
            Try
                myTask = New Task()
                myTask.AIChannels.CreateVoltageChannel("Dev1/ai0", "", CType(-1, AITerminalConfiguration), 0, 10, AIVoltageUnits.Volts)
                myTask.AIChannels.CreateVoltageChannel("Dev1/ai1", "", CType(-1, AITerminalConfiguration), 0, 10, AIVoltageUnits.Volts)
                myTask.Timing.ConfigureSampleClock("", 1000, SampleClockActiveEdge.Rising, SampleQuantityMode.ContinuousSamples, 100)
                myTask.Timing.ConfigureSampleClock("", 1000, SampleClockActiveEdge.Rising, SampleQuantityMode.ContinuousSamples, 100)
                myTask.Control(TaskAction.Verify)
                runningTask = myTask
                analogInReader = New AnalogMultiChannelReader(myTask.Stream)
                analogCallback = New AsyncCallback(AddressOf AnalogInCallback)
                InitializeDataTable(myTask.AIChannels, dataTable)
                acquisitionDataGrid.DataSource = dataTable
                analogInReader.SynchronizeCallbacks = True
                analogInReader.BeginReadWaveform(100, analogCallback, myTask)
            Catch exception As DaqException
                MessageBox.Show(exception.Message)
                runningTask = Nothing
                myTask.Dispose()
            End Try
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub DaqEnd()
        runningTask = Nothing
        myTask.Dispose()
    End Sub

    Private BufferCell1 As String
    Private Sub RequestLoadCell()
        If SerialCAN.IsOpen = True Then SerialCAN.Write("0R")
    End Sub
    Private Sub ResetLoadCell()
        If SerialCAN.IsOpen = True Then SerialCAN.Write("0Z")
    End Sub

    Private Sub TESTBASICToolStripMenuItem_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles TESTBASICToolStripMenuItem.Click

        WriteLog("Click Basic", "LOG")
        TmpOpenForm = FrmBasic
        If strPassWord = "0" Then

    Private Sub ReclFwd()
        DoOn(4)
    End Sub
    Private Sub ReclBwd()
        DoOn(5)
    End Sub
    Private Sub ReclStop()
        DoOff(4)
        DoOff(5)
    End Sub

    Private TmpEndVolt As Double
    'Private rand As New Random()
    Private Structure Sample
        Public t As Double
        Public amp As Double
        Public noise As Double
    End Structure

    ' 시작/이동 구간 통계 관리 (마지막 1초 제외 커밋)
    Private Class ReclStats
        Private ReadOnly q As New Queue(Of Sample)(200) ' 10ms 주기면 1초≈100, 여유 200

        Public StartAmpMax As Double = Double.MinValue
        Public StartNoiseMax As Double = Double.MinValue
        Public MoveAmpMax As Double = Double.MinValue
        Public MoveAmpMin As Double = Double.MaxValue
        Public MoveNoiseMax As Double = Double.MinValue

        ' t: 현재 시간(sec), amp/noise: 샘플, reclSector: 시작/이동 구간 경계(sec)
        Public Sub Push(t As Double, amp As Double, noise As Double, reclSector As Double)
            q.Enqueue(New Sample With {.t = t, .amp = amp, .noise = noise})

            ' 현재 t 기준 1초 이상 지난 것만 커밋 → 자연스럽게 "끝 1초 제외"
            While q.Count > 0 AndAlso (t - q.Peek().t) >= 1.0
                Dim s = q.Dequeue()
                If s.t < reclSector Then
                    If s.amp > StartAmpMax Then StartAmpMax = s.amp
                    If s.noise > StartNoiseMax Then StartNoiseMax = s.noise
                Else
                    If s.amp > MoveAmpMax Then MoveAmpMax = s.amp
                    If s.amp < MoveAmpMin Then MoveAmpMin = s.amp
                    If s.noise > MoveNoiseMax Then MoveNoiseMax = s.noise
                End If
            End While
        End Sub

        Public Sub Reset()
            q.Clear()
            StartAmpMax = Double.MinValue
            StartNoiseMax = Double.MinValue
            MoveAmpMax = Double.MinValue
            MoveAmpMin = Double.MaxValue
            MoveNoiseMax = Double.MinValue
        End Sub
    End Class

    Private LsuptInfTime As Double
    Private LsuptdefTime As Double

    Private BolsterInfTime As Double
    Private BolsterdefTime As Double
    Private TmpBCount As Integer

    Private CanDelay As Double = 2
    Private Sub ThreadTask1()

        Dim TotalTime As Double
        Dim i As Integer
        Dim TmpSTartAngle As Double
        Dim TmpEndAngle As Double

        Dim stats As New ReclStats()  ' ★ 배열 대신 통계 관리

        Do
            ' --- [리클라이너 섹션: 모터 구동 (기존 로직 유지)] ---
            If wStep = 99 Then ' RECL FWD
                CanBusService.AddTraceLog("-- 리클 전진 - 하드와이어 구동 (CAN 해당사항 없음)--")
                Appendlog("리클 전진 시작")

                ' Vision 검사 자동 시작 (다른 검사 전 최초)
                If VisionServer IsNot Nothing AndAlso VisionServer.IsClientConnected Then
                    VisionServer.SendStartCommand()
                    Appendlog("[VisionSocket] 자동 START 명령 전송")
                End If

                sw.Restart()
                TargetVolt1 = BasicReclTestVolt
                ReclFwd()
                wStep = 99.1

            ElseIf wStep = 99.1 Then
                TotalTime = sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                If (ValueAmp1 > BasicReclStopAmp AndAlso TotalTime > 1) OrElse (ValueAmp1 < 0.1 AndAlso TotalTime > 1) Then
                    ReclStop()
                    sw.Restart()
                    wStep = 99.2
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 99.2 Then
                If sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 1 Then
                    wStep = 100
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 100 Then ' RECL BWD 시작
                CanBusService.AddTraceLog("-- 리클 후진 검사 - 하드와이어 구동 (CAN 해당사항 없음)--")
                Appendlog("리클 후진 검사 시작")
                stats.Reset()
                TmpSTartAngle = CDbl(Format(Laser2Angle(ValueLaser))) ' 시작각(또는 길이)
                TargetVolt1 = BasicReclTestVolt
                ReclBwd()
                sw.Restart()
                wStep = 101

            ElseIf wStep = 101 Then ' 측정 중 (BWD)
                TotalTime = sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                Try
                    ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(ZedGraphReclBwdAmp, 0, ValueAmp1, TotalTime)
                    ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(ZedGraphReclBwdNoise, 0, ValueNoise, TotalTime)
                Catch ex As Exception
                End Try
                stats.Push(TotalTime, ValueAmp1, ValueNoise, ReclSector)
                If TotalTime > 2 AndAlso (ValueAmp1 > BasicReclStopAmp OrElse ValueAmp1 < 0.01) Then
                    ReclStop()
                    wStep = 102
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 102 Then ' BWD 결과 계산/표시
                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(ZedGraphReclBwdAmp,
                              yLines:=New Double() {stats.MoveAmpMax,
                                                   If(stats.MoveAmpMin = Double.MaxValue, 0, stats.MoveAmpMin),
                                                   BasicReclBwdMovingAmpMin, BasicReclBwdMovingAmpMax},
                              xLines:=New Double() {0, ReclSector, Math.Max(0, TotalTime - 1)},
                              yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                              lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)
                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(ZedGraphReclBwdNoise,
                              yLines:=New Double() {BasicReclBwdMovingNoiseMin, BasicReclBwdMovingNoiseMax},
                              xLines:=New Double() {0, ReclSector, Math.Max(0, TotalTime - 1)},
                              yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                              lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)
                DecideControl(srclbReclBwdAmpDiffVal, srclbReclBwdAmpDiffDec, BAsicReclBWdDiffMin, BAsicReclBWdDiffMax, (stats.MoveAmpMax - If(stats.MoveAmpMin = Double.MaxValue, stats.MoveAmpMax, stats.MoveAmpMin)))
                DecideControl(srclbReclBwdStartAmpVal, srclbReclBwdStartAmpDec, BasicReclBwdStartAmpMin, BasicReclBwdStartAmpMax, If(stats.StartAmpMax = Double.MinValue, 0, stats.StartAmpMax))
                DecideControl(srclbReclBwdMovingAmpVal, srclbReclBwdMovingAmpDec, BasicReclBwdMovingAmpMin, BasicReclBwdMovingAmpMax, If(stats.MoveAmpMax = Double.MinValue, 0, stats.MoveAmpMax))
                DecideControl(srclbReclBwdStartNoiseVal, srclbReclBwdStartNoiseDec, BasicReclBwdStartNoiseMin, BasicReclBwdStartNoiseMax, If(stats.StartNoiseMax = Double.MinValue, 0, stats.StartNoiseMax))
                DecideControl(srclbReclBwdMovingNoiseVal, srclbReclBwdMovingNoiseDec, BasicReclBwdMovingNoiseMin, BasicReclBwdMovingNoiseMax, If(stats.MoveNoiseMax = Double.MinValue, 0, stats.MoveNoiseMax))
                DecideControl(srclbReclBwdAngleVal, srclbReclBwdAngleDec, BasicReclBwdAngleMin, BasicReclBwdAngleMax, CDbl(Format(Laser2Angle(ValueLaser), "#0.0#")))
                TmpEndAngle = CDbl(Format(Laser2Angle(ValueLaser)))
                DecideControl(srclbReclBwdSpeedVal, srclbReclBwdSpeedDec, BasicReclBwdSpeedMin, BasicReclBwdSpeedMax, Math.Abs(CDbl(Format((TmpSTartAngle - TmpEndAngle) / Math.Max(0.001, TotalTime), "#0.0#"))))
                Appendlog("리클 후진 검사 종료")
                wStep = 110

            ElseIf wStep = 110 Then ' RECL FWD 시작
                Appendlog("리클 전진 검사 시작")
                CanBusService.AddTraceLog("-- 리클 전진 검사 - 하드와이어 구동 (CAN 해당사항 없음)--")
                TmpSTartAngle = CDbl(Format(Laser2Angle(ValueLaser)))
                ReclFwd()
                stats.Reset()
                sw.Restart()
                wStep = 111

            ElseIf wStep = 111 Then ' 측정 중 (FWD)
                TotalTime = sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                Try
                    ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(ZedGraphReclFwdAmp, 0, ValueAmp1, TotalTime)
                    ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(ZedGraphReclFwdNoise, 0, ValueNoise, TotalTime)
                Catch ex As Exception
                End Try
                stats.Push(TotalTime, ValueAmp1, ValueNoise, ReclSector)
                If TotalTime > 2 AndAlso (ValueAmp1 > BasicReclStopAmp OrElse ValueAmp1 < 0.01) Then
                    ReclStop()
                    wStep = 112
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 112 Then ' FWD 결과
                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(ZedGraphReclFwdAmp,
                              yLines:=New Double() {stats.MoveAmpMax,
                                                   If(stats.MoveAmpMin = Double.MaxValue, 0, stats.MoveAmpMin),
                                                   BasicReclFwdMovingAmpMin, BasicReclFwdMovingAmpMax},
                              xLines:=New Double() {0, ReclSector, Math.Max(0, TotalTime - 1)},
                              yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                              lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)
                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(ZedGraphReclFwdNoise,
                              yLines:=New Double() {BasicReclFwdMovingNoiseMin, BasicReclFwdMovingNoiseMax},
                              xLines:=New Double() {0, ReclSector, Math.Max(0, TotalTime - 1)},
                              yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                              lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)
                DecideControl(srclbReclFwdAmpDiffVal, srclbReclFwdAmpDiffDec, BAsicReclFWdDiffMin, BAsicReclFWdDiffMax, (stats.MoveAmpMax - If(stats.MoveAmpMin = Double.MaxValue, stats.MoveAmpMax, stats.MoveAmpMin)))
                DecideControl(srclbReclFwdStartAmpVal, srclbReclFwdStartAmpDec, BasicReclFwdStartAmpMin, BasicReclFwdStartAmpMax, If(stats.StartAmpMax = Double.MinValue, 0, stats.StartAmpMax))
                DecideControl(srclbReclFwdMovingAmpVal, srclbReclFwdMovingAmpDec, BasicReclFwdMovingAmpMin, BasicReclFwdMovingAmpMax, If(stats.MoveAmpMax = Double.MinValue, 0, stats.MoveAmpMax))
                DecideControl(srclbReclFwdStartNoiseVal, srclbReclFwdStartNoiseDec, BasicReclFwdStartNoiseMin, BasicReclFwdStartNoiseMax, If(stats.StartNoiseMax = Double.MinValue, 0, stats.StartNoiseMax))
                DecideControl(srclbReclFwdMovingNoiseVal, srclbReclFwdMovingNoiseDec, BasicReclFwdMovingNoiseMin, BasicReclFwdMovingNoiseMax, If(stats.MoveNoiseMax = Double.MinValue, 0, stats.MoveNoiseMax))
                If BasicAngleMode = "ANGLE" Then
                    DecideControl(srclbReclFwdAngleVal, srclbReclFwdAngleDec, BasicReclFwdAngleMin, BasicReclFwdAngleMax, CDbl(Format(Laser2Angle(ValueLaser), "#0.0#")))
                Else
                    DecideControl(srclbReclFwdAngleVal, srclbReclFwdAngleDec, BasicReclFwdAngleMin, BasicReclFwdAngleMax, ValueLaser)
                End If
                TmpEndAngle = CDbl(Format(Laser2Angle(ValueLaser)))
                DecideControl(srclbReclFwdSpeedVal, srclbReclFwdSpeedDec, BasicReclFwdSpeedMin, BasicReclFwdSpeedMax, Math.Abs(CDbl(Format((TmpSTartAngle - TmpEndAngle) / Math.Max(0.001, TotalTime), "#0.0#"))))
                Appendlog("리클 전진 검사 종료")
                wStep = 120

            ElseIf wStep = 120 Then ' 출하각
                Appendlog("출하각 후진")
                ReclBwd()
                sw.Restart()
                wStep = 121

            ElseIf wStep = 121 Then
                TotalTime = sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                If TotalTime > 3 AndAlso (ValueAmp1 < 0.01 OrElse ValueAmp1 > 6) Then
                    ReclStop()
                    wStep = 122
                End If
                If BasicAngleMode = "ANGLE" Then
                    srclbReclEndAngleVal.Text = Format(Laser2Angle(ValueLaser), "#0.0#")
                    Dim ang As Double = CDbl(srclbReclEndAngleVal.Text)
                    If ang >= BasicReclEndAngleMin - 1 AndAlso ang <= BasicReclEndAngleMax + 1 Then
                        ReclStop()
                        wStep = 122
                    End If
                Else
                    If ValueLaser >= BasicReclEndAngleMin AndAlso ValueLaser <= BasicReclEndAngleMax Then
                        ReclStop()
                        wStep = 122
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 122 Then
                If BasicAngleMode = "ANGLE" Then
                    DecideControl(srclbReclEndAngleVal, srclbReclEndAngleDec, BasicReclEndAngleMin, BasicReclEndAngleMax, CDbl(Format(Laser2Angle(ValueLaser), "#0.0#")))
                Else
                    DecideControl(srclbReclEndAngleVal, srclbReclEndAngleDec, BasicReclEndAngleMin, BasicReclEndAngleMax, ValueLaser)
                End If
                If srclbReclEndAngleDec.Text = "OK" Then
                    wStep = 128
                Else
                    wStep = 123
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 123 Then
                Dim TmpEndVolt As Double = TargetVolt1 * 0.7
                TargetVolt1 = TmpEndVolt
                Dim ang As Double = CDbl(srclbReclEndAngleVal.Text)
                TargetVolt1 = 7
                If ang < BasicReclEndAngleMin Then
                    Appendlog("출하각 전진") : ReclFwd()
                ElseIf ang > BasicReclEndAngleMax Then
                    Appendlog("출하각 후진") : ReclBwd()
                End If
                wStep = 124

            ElseIf wStep = 124 Then
                Appendlog("출하각 완료")
                srclbReclEndAngleVal.Text = Format(Laser2Angle(ValueLaser), "#0.0#")
                Dim ang As Double = CDbl(srclbReclEndAngleVal.Text)
                If ang >= BasicReclEndAngleMin AndAlso ang <= BasicReclEndAngleMax Then
                    ReclStop()
                    wStep = 122
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 128 Then
                sw.Restart()
                wStep = 128.1

            ElseIf wStep = 128.1 Then
                ' 리클라이너 검사 정보 먼저 DB 업데이트
                UpdateSQLDB_Recliner(srcLbSerialNo.Text)
                wStep = 128.2

            ElseIf wStep = 128.2 Then
                If sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 1 Then wStep = 130

                ' --- [럼버 섹션: 에어셀 (타임아웃 로직 수정)] ---
            ElseIf wStep = 130 Then
                CanBusService.AddTraceLog("-- 럼버 전체 흡기 검사 --")
                LsuptInfTime = BasicLsuptInfTime
                Appendlog($"Lsupt 흡기 시간 : {LsuptInfTime.ToString()}")
                LsuptdefTime = BasicLsuptDefTime
                Appendlog($"Lsupt 배기 시간 : {LsuptdefTime.ToString()}")
                BolsterInfTime = BasicBolsterInfTime
                Appendlog($"Bolster 흡기 시간 : {BolsterInfTime.ToString()}")
                'BolsterdefTime = 25 ' <-- 25초 하드코딩 유지
                BolsterdefTime = BasicBolsterDefTime
                Appendlog($"Bolster 배기 시간 : {BolsterdefTime.ToString()}")
                Appendlog("럼버 전체 흡기 검사 시작")
                stats.Reset()
                TmpBCount = 0 ' 리프레시 카운터 초기화
                sw.Restart()  ' 타이머 시작
                wStep = 131   ' 메인 루프로 바로 이동

            ElseIf wStep = 131 Then
                TotalTime = sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds

                ' 1. 설정 시간 (LsuptInfTime) 이전
                If TotalTime <= LsuptInfTime Then

                    ' 0.5초마다 ECU 타임아웃 방지용 명령 재전송
                    If TmpBCount < CInt(TotalTime * 2) Then
                        TmpBCount = CInt(TotalTime * 2)
                        CanBusService.AddTraceLog($"[wStep 131] 럼버 흡기 유지 중... {TotalTime:F1}초 / 펌프: {ValueAmp2:F2}A")
                        If OptionPos1 = "LH" Then
                            RunIocbi(SeatSide.Driver, ZoneType.LumbarUpper, MotionType.mInflate)
                            RunIocbi(SeatSide.Driver, ZoneType.LumbarMiddle, MotionType.mInflate)
                            RunIocbi(SeatSide.Driver, ZoneType.LumbarLower, MotionType.mInflate)
                        ElseIf OptionPos1 = "RH" Then
                            RunIocbi(SeatSide.Assistant, ZoneType.LumbarUpper, MotionType.mInflate)
                            RunIocbi(SeatSide.Assistant, ZoneType.LumbarMiddle, MotionType.mInflate)
                            RunIocbi(SeatSide.Assistant, ZoneType.LumbarLower, MotionType.mInflate)
                        End If
                    End If

                    ' 그래프 그리기
                    Try
                        ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(ZedGraphLsuptInfAmp, 0, ValueAmp2, TotalTime)
                        ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(ZedGraphLsuptInfNoise, 0, ValueNoise, TotalTime)
                    Catch ex As Exception
                    End Try
                    stats.Push(TotalTime, ValueAmp2, ValueNoise, ReclSector)

                    ' 2. 설정 시간 초과 시 정지
                Else
                    CanBusService.AddTraceLog($"[wStep 131] 럼버 흡기 시간({LsuptInfTime}초) 완료. 정지 신호 전송.")
                    If OptionPos1 = "LH" Then
                        If RunIocbi(SeatSide.Driver, ZoneType.LumbarUpper, MotionType.mStop) AndAlso
                           RunIocbi(SeatSide.Driver, ZoneType.LumbarMiddle, MotionType.mStop) AndAlso
                           RunIocbi(SeatSide.Driver, ZoneType.LumbarLower, MotionType.mStop) Then
                            sw.Restart()
                            wStep = 132
                        End If
                    ElseIf OptionPos1 = "RH" Then
                        If RunIocbi(SeatSide.Assistant, ZoneType.LumbarUpper, MotionType.mStop) AndAlso
                           RunIocbi(SeatSide.Assistant, ZoneType.LumbarMiddle, MotionType.mStop) AndAlso
                           RunIocbi(SeatSide.Assistant, ZoneType.LumbarLower, MotionType.mStop) Then
                            sw.Restart()
                            wStep = 132
                        End If
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 132 Then
                DecideControl(srclbLsuptUpperInfAmpVal, srclbLsuptUpperInfAmpdEc, 0.1, 1, If(stats.MoveAmpMax = Double.MinValue, 0, stats.MoveAmpMax))
                DecideControl(srclbLsuptUpperInfNoiseVal, srclbLsuptUpperInfNoisedEc, 0, 55, If(stats.MoveNoiseMax = Double.MinValue, 0, stats.MoveNoiseMax))
                Appendlog("럼버 전체 흡기 검사 종료")
                sw.Restart()
                wStep = 132.1

            ElseIf wStep = 132.1 Then
                If sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > CanDelay Then wStep = 140

            ElseIf wStep = 140 Then
                CanBusService.AddTraceLog("-- 럼버 전체 배기 검사 --")
                Appendlog("럼버 전체 배기 검사 시작")
                stats.Reset()
                TmpBCount = 0 ' 리프레시 카운터 초기화
                sw.Restart()  ' 타이머 시작
                wStep = 141   ' 메인 루프로 바로 이동

            ElseIf wStep = 141 Then
                TotalTime = sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds

                ' 1. 설정 시간 (LsuptdefTime) 이전
                If TotalTime <= LsuptdefTime Then

                    ' 0.5초마다 ECU 타임아웃 방지용 명령 재전송
                    If TmpBCount < CInt(TotalTime * 2) Then
                        TmpBCount = CInt(TotalTime * 2)
                        CanBusService.AddTraceLog($"[wStep 141] 럼버 배기 유지 중... {TotalTime:F1}초 / 펌프: {ValueAmp2:F2}A")
                        If OptionPos1 = "LH" Then
                            RunIocbi(SeatSide.Driver, ZoneType.LumbarUpper, MotionType.mDeflate)
                            RunIocbi(SeatSide.Driver, ZoneType.LumbarMiddle, MotionType.mDeflate)
                            RunIocbi(SeatSide.Driver, ZoneType.LumbarLower, MotionType.mDeflate)
                        ElseIf OptionPos1 = "RH" Then
                            RunIocbi(SeatSide.Assistant, ZoneType.LumbarUpper, MotionType.mDeflate)
                            RunIocbi(SeatSide.Assistant, ZoneType.LumbarMiddle, MotionType.mDeflate)
                            RunIocbi(SeatSide.Assistant, ZoneType.LumbarLower, MotionType.mDeflate)
                        End If
                    End If

                    ' 그래프 그리기
                    Try
                        ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(ZedGraphLsuptDefAmp, 0, ValueAmp2, TotalTime)
                        ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(ZedGraphLsuptDefNoise, 0, ValueNoise, TotalTime)
                    Catch ex As Exception
                    End Try
                    stats.Push(TotalTime, ValueAmp2, ValueNoise, ReclSector)

                    ' 2. 설정 시간 초과 시 정지
                Else
                    CanBusService.AddTraceLog($"[wStep 141] 럼버 배기 시간({LsuptdefTime}초) 완료. 정지 신호 전송.")
                    If OptionPos1 = "LH" Then
                        If RunIocbi(SeatSide.Driver, ZoneType.LumbarUpper, MotionType.mStop) AndAlso
                           RunIocbi(SeatSide.Driver, ZoneType.LumbarMiddle, MotionType.mStop) AndAlso
                           RunIocbi(SeatSide.Driver, ZoneType.LumbarLower, MotionType.mStop) Then
                            sw.Restart()
                            wStep = 142
                        End If
                    ElseIf OptionPos1 = "RH" Then
                        If RunIocbi(SeatSide.Assistant, ZoneType.LumbarUpper, MotionType.mStop) AndAlso
                           RunIocbi(SeatSide.Assistant, ZoneType.LumbarMiddle, MotionType.mStop) AndAlso
                           RunIocbi(SeatSide.Assistant, ZoneType.LumbarLower, MotionType.mStop) Then
                            sw.Restart()
                            wStep = 142
                        End If
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 142 Then
                DecideControl(srclbLsuptUpperdefAmpVal, srclbLsuptUpperdefAmpdEc, 0.1, 1, If(stats.MoveAmpMax = Double.MinValue, 0, stats.MoveAmpMax))
                DecideControl(srclbLsuptUpperdefNoiseVal, srclbLsuptUpperdefNoisedEc, 0, 55, If(stats.MoveNoiseMax = Double.MinValue, 0, stats.MoveNoiseMax))
                Appendlog("럼버 배기 검사 종료")
                sw.Restart()
                wStep = 190

                ' --- [볼스터 섹션: 에어셀 (타임아웃 로직 수정)] ---
            ElseIf wStep = 190 Then
                sw.Restart()
                wStep = 191

            ElseIf wStep = 191 Then
                TotalTime = sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                If TotalTime > CanDelay Then
                    wStep = 195
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 195 Then
                wStep = 200

            ElseIf wStep = 200 Then '볼스터
                CanBusService.AddTraceLog("-- 볼스터 흡기 검사 --")
                Appendlog("볼스터 흡기 검사 시작")
                stats.Reset()
                TmpBCount = 0 ' 리프레시 카운터 초기화
                sw.Restart()
                wStep = 201

            ElseIf wStep = 201 Then
                TotalTime = sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                Dim TargetTime As Double = BolsterInfTime

                ' 1. 설정 시간 (TargetTime) 이전
                If TotalTime <= TargetTime Then

                    ' 0.5초마다 ECU 타임아웃 방지용 명령 재전송
                    If TmpBCount < CInt(TotalTime * 2) Then
                        TmpBCount = CInt(TotalTime * 2)
                        CanBusService.AddTraceLog($"[wStep 201] 볼스터 흡기 유지 중... {TotalTime:F1}초 / 펌프: {ValueAmp2:F2}A")
                        If OptionPos1 = "LH" Then
                            RunIocbi(SeatSide.Driver, ZoneType.Bolster, MotionType.mInflate)
                        ElseIf OptionPos1 = "RH" Then
                            RunIocbi(SeatSide.Assistant, ZoneType.Bolster, MotionType.mInflate)
                        End If
                    End If

                    ' 그래프 그리기
                    Try
                        ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(ZedGraphBolsterAmp, 0, ValueAmp2, TotalTime)
                        ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(ZedGraphBolsterNoise, 0, ValueNoise, TotalTime)
                    Catch ex As Exception
                    End Try
                    stats.Push(TotalTime, ValueAmp2, ValueNoise, ReclSector)

                    ' 2. 설정 시간 초과 시 정지
                Else
                    CanBusService.AddTraceLog($"[wStep 201] 볼스터 흡기 시간({TargetTime}초) 완료. 정지 신호 전송.")
                    If OptionPos1 = "LH" Then
                        If RunIocbi(SeatSide.Driver, ZoneType.Bolster, MotionType.mStop) Then
                            sw.Restart()
                            wStep = 202
                        End If
                    ElseIf OptionPos1 = "RH" Then
                        If RunIocbi(SeatSide.Assistant, ZoneType.Bolster, MotionType.mStop) Then
                            sw.Restart()
                            wStep = 202
                        End If
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 202 Then
                DecideControl(srclbBolsterInfAmpVal, srclbBolsterInfAmpDec, 0, 1, If(stats.MoveAmpMax = Double.MinValue, 0, stats.MoveAmpMax))
                DecideControl(srclbBolsterInfNoiseVal, srclbBolsterInfNoiseDec, 0, 55, If(stats.MoveNoiseMax = Double.MinValue, 0, stats.MoveNoiseMax))
                Appendlog("볼스터 흡기 검사 종료")
                sw.Restart()
                wStep = 202.1

            ElseIf wStep = 202.1 Then
                If sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > CanDelay Then wStep = 203

            ElseIf wStep = 203 Then '볼스터
                CanBusService.AddTraceLog("-- 볼스터 배기 검사 --")
                TmpBCount = 0
                Appendlog("볼스터 배기 검사 시작")
                stats.Reset()
                sw.Restart()
                wStep = 204

            ElseIf wStep = 204 Then
                TotalTime = sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                Dim TargetTime As Double = BolsterdefTime

                ' 1. 설정 시간 (TargetTime) 이전
                If TotalTime <= TargetTime Then

                    ' 0.5초마다 ECU 타임아웃 방지용 명령 재전송
                    If TmpBCount < CInt(TotalTime * 2) Then
                        TmpBCount = CInt(TotalTime * 2)
                        CanBusService.AddTraceLog($"[wStep 204] 볼스터 배기 유지 중... {TotalTime:F1}초 / 펌프: {ValueAmp2:F2}A")
                        If OptionPos1 = "LH" Then
                            RunIocbi(SeatSide.Driver, ZoneType.Bolster, MotionType.mDeflate)
                        ElseIf OptionPos1 = "RH" Then
                            RunIocbi(SeatSide.Assistant, ZoneType.Bolster, MotionType.mDeflate)
                        End If
                    End If

                    ' 그래프 그리기
                    Try
                        ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(ZedGraphBolsterAmp, 1, ValueAmp2, TotalTime)
                        ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(ZedGraphBolsterNoise, 1, ValueNoise, TotalTime)
                    Catch ex As Exception
                    End Try
                    stats.Push(TotalTime, ValueAmp2, ValueNoise, ReclSector)

                    ' 2. 설정 시간 초과 시 정지
                Else
                    CanBusService.AddTraceLog($"[wStep 204] 볼스터 배기 시간({TargetTime}초) 완료. 정지 신호 전송.")
                    If OptionPos1 = "LH" Then
                        If RunIocbi(SeatSide.Driver, ZoneType.Bolster, MotionType.mStop) Then
                            sw.Restart()
                            wStep = 205
                        End If
                    ElseIf OptionPos1 = "RH" Then
                        If RunIocbi(SeatSide.Assistant, ZoneType.Bolster, MotionType.mStop) Then
                            sw.Restart()
                            wStep = 205
                        End If
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 205 Then
                DecideControl(srclbBolsterDefAmpVal, srclbBolsterDefAmpDec, 0, 1, If(stats.MoveAmpMax = Double.MinValue, 0, stats.MoveAmpMax))
                DecideControl(srclbBolsterDefNoiseVal, srclbBolsterDefNoiseDec, 0, 55, If(stats.MoveNoiseMax = Double.MinValue, 0, stats.MoveNoiseMax))
                Appendlog("볼스터 배기 검사 종료")
                wStep = 206

            ElseIf wStep = 206 Then
                If OptionPos1 = "LH" Then
                    If RunIocbi(SeatSide.Driver, ZoneType.LumbarLower, MotionType.mStop) Then
                        sw.Restart()
                        wStep = 210
                    End If
                ElseIf OptionPos1 = "RH" Then
                    If RunIocbi(SeatSide.Assistant, ZoneType.LumbarLower, MotionType.mStop) Then
                        sw.Restart()
                        wStep = 210
                    End If
                End If

                ' --- [헤드레스트 섹션: 모터 구동 (기존 로직 유지)] ---
            ElseIf wStep = 210 Then
                Appendlog("헤드레스트 하강 검사 시작")
                stats.Reset()
                If OptionPos1 = "LH" Then
                    srclbHrestUpAmpDec.Text = "NA"
                    srclbHrestUpAmpDec.BackColor = Color.Green
                    srclbHrestDownAmpDec.Text = "NA"
                    srclbHrestDownAmpDec.BackColor = Color.Green
                    srclbHrestUpNoiseDec.Text = "NA"
                    srclbHrestUpNoiseDec.BackColor = Color.Green
                    srclbHrestDownNoiseDec.Text = "NA"
                    srclbHrestDownNoiseDec.BackColor = Color.Green
                    wStep = 300
                    TmrWork.Start() ' --- [수정] --- 제어권 반환
                ElseIf OptionPos1 = "RH" Then
                    DoOn(2)
                    sw.Restart()
                    wStep = 211
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 211 Then
                TotalTime = sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                Try
                    ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(ZedGraphHeadAmp, 1, ValueAmp2, TotalTime)
                    ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(ZedGraphHeadNoise, 1, ValueNoise, TotalTime)
                Catch ex As Exception
                End Try
                stats.Push(TotalTime, ValueAmp2, ValueNoise, ReclSector)
                If ValueAmp2 > 2 And TotalTime > 1 Then
                    If OptionPos1 = "LH" Then
                        DoOff(2)
                    ElseIf OptionPos1 = "RH" Then
                        DoOff(2)
                    End If
                    wStep = 212
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 212 Then
                DecideControl(srclbHrestDownAmpVal, srclbHrestDownAmpDec, 0.5, 2, If(stats.MoveAmpMax = Double.MinValue, 0, stats.MoveAmpMax))
                DecideControl(srclbHrestDownNoiseVal, srclbHrestDownNoiseDec, 0, 55, If(stats.MoveNoiseMax = Double.MinValue, 0, stats.MoveNoiseMax))
                Appendlog("헤드레스트 하강 검사 종료")
                wStep = 213

            ElseIf wStep = 213 Then '헤드레스트 상승
                Appendlog("헤드레스트 상승 검사 시작")
                stats.Reset()
                If OptionPos1 = "LH" Then
                    DoOn(3)
                ElseIf OptionPos1 = "RH" Then
                    DoOn(3)
                End If
                sw.Restart()
                wStep = 214

            ElseIf wStep = 214 Then
                TotalTime = sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                Try
                    ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(ZedGraphHeadAmp, 0, ValueAmp2, TotalTime)
                    ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(ZedGraphHeadNoise, 0, ValueNoise, TotalTime)
                Catch ex As Exception
                End Try
                stats.Push(TotalTime, ValueAmp2, ValueNoise, ReclSector)
                If ValueAmp2 > 2 And TotalTime > 1 Then
                    If OptionPos1 = "LH" Then
                        DoOff(3)
                    ElseIf OptionPos1 = "RH" Then
                        DoOff(3)
                    End If
                    wStep = 215
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 215 Then
                DecideControl(srclbHrestUpAmpVal, srclbHrestUpAmpDec, 0.5, 2, If(stats.MoveAmpMax = Double.MinValue, 0, stats.MoveAmpMax))
                DecideControl(srclbHrestUpNoiseVal, srclbHrestUpNoiseDec, 0, 55, If(stats.MoveNoiseMax = Double.MinValue, 0, stats.MoveNoiseMax))
                Appendlog("헤드레스트 상승 검사 종료")
                wStep = 300
                TmrWork.Start() ' --- [수정] --- 제어권 반환
            End If

            Thread.Sleep(50)
            Application.DoEvents()

        Loop

    End Sub

    Private Sub DecideControl(lValue As System.Windows.Forms.Label, lDecision As System.Windows.Forms.Label, sMin As Double, sMax As Double, mValue As Double)

        lValue.Text = CStr(mValue)
        If mValue >= sMin And mValue <= sMax Then
            lDecision.Text = "OK"
            lDecision.BackColor = Color.DarkBlue
        Else
            lDecision.Text = "NG"
            lDecision.BackColor = Color.DarkRed
        End If

    End Sub

    Private gAngle() As Double
    Private gLaser() As Double

    Private Sub LoadAngleData()

        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim i As Integer
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Angle ORDER BY LaserDistance asc", MdbConnect)

        ReDim gAngle(Rs.RecordCount)
        ReDim gLaser(Rs.RecordCount)
        If Rs.RecordCount = 0 Then
        ElseIf Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
            gAngle(0) = Rs.Fields("ConvetAngle").Value
            gLaser(0) = Rs.Fields("LaserDistance").Value
        ElseIf Rs.RecordCount > 1 Then
            i = 0
            Rs.MoveFirst()
            Do Until Rs.EOF
                gAngle(i) = Rs.Fields("ConvertAngle").Value
                gLaser(i) = Rs.Fields("LaserDistance").Value
                i = i + 1
                Rs.MoveNext()
            Loop
        End If
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        ConnectionCloseMDB()

    End Sub

    Public Function Calc(ByVal aLaser As Double, ByVal aAngle As Double, ByVal bLaser As Double, ByVal bAngle As Double, ByVal val As Double) As Double
        Dim t As Double
        Dim tmp As Double = 0
        Try
            If aLaser = 0 And aAngle = 0 And bLaser = 0 And bAngle = 0 Then
                tmp = 0
            Else
                t = (aAngle - bAngle) / (aLaser - bLaser)
                tmp = (t * val) - (t * bLaser) + bAngle
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
        Return tmp
    End Function

    Private Function Laser2Angle(ByVal vLaser As Double) As Double
        Dim tmp As Double = 0
        Try
            For i As Integer = 0 To UBound(gLaser) - 1
                If vLaser >= gLaser(i) And vLaser <= gLaser(i + 1) Then
                    tmp = Calc(gLaser(i), gAngle(i), gLaser(i + 1), gAngle(i + 1), vLaser)
                End If
            Next i
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
        Return tmp
    End Function

    Private Function StampMessage(ByVal msg As String) As String
        ' "HH:mm:ss" → 시:분:초
        ' 밀리초까지 원하면 "HH:mm:ss.fff" 로 변경
        Return String.Format("[{0}] {1}", Date.Now.ToString("HH:mm:ss.fff"), msg)
    End Function

    Private mChannel As TPCANHandle = &H51US   ' PCAN-USB FD 채널 예시 (환경에 맞게 수정)
    Private FlagCanInit As Boolean = False
    Private FlagHandlers As Boolean = False

    ' ===== 공통 초기화 =====
    Public Sub CanCommonInit()
        Dim st As TPCANStatus = PCANBasic.InitializeFD(mChannel, CanBusService.FixedFdBitrate)
        If st <> TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_OK AndAlso st <> TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_CAUTION Then
            Appendlog("[PCAN][INIT-ERR] " & st.ToString())
            Exit Sub
        End If
        Appendlog("[PCAN] InitializeFD OK")
        Appendlog("[MAIN] CAN Common Init OK")
        FlagCanInit = True

        ' 로깅/트레이스 설정
        CanBusService.LogEnabled = True
        CanBusService.IncludeTimestamp = True
        CanBusService.RawTrace = True
        CanBusService.UdsTrace = True
        CanBusService.SchedulerTrace = False
        CanBusService.SingleSeatMode = True

        ' 쓰레기 RAW 로그 억제 (출력만 막음)
        CanBusService.AddRawLogSuppressId(&H17FC00D9UI)
        CanBusService.AddRawLogSuppressId(&H17FC00D3)
        CanBusService.AddRawLogSuppressId(&H186UI)
        CanBusService.AddRawLogSuppressId(&H1UI)
        CanBusService.AddRawLogSuppressId(&H240)
        CanBusService.AddRawLogSuppressId(&H187)

        RemoveHandler CanBusService.Log, AddressOf OnCanLog
        AddHandler CanBusService.Log, AddressOf OnCanLog

        RemoveHandler CanBusService.UdsCompleted, AddressOf OnUdsCompleted
        AddHandler CanBusService.UdsCompleted, AddressOf OnUdsCompleted

    End Sub

    ' ===== 운전석 세션 시작 =====
    Public Function SessionStart_Drv() As Boolean

        If Not FlagCanInit Then
            Appendlog("[DRV] CAN not initialized")
            Return False
        End If

        ' KA 정지 후 운전석 타깃으로 부착
        CanBusService.StopKeepAlive()
        Threading.Thread.Sleep(30)

        CanBusService.SelectTarget(CanBusService.SeatTarget.Driver)
        Threading.Thread.Sleep(10)

        CanBusService.Attach(mChannel, &H752US, &H75AUS, fd:=True, brs:=True, testerKeepAliveMs:=1000, suppressPosResp:=True)
        Appendlog("[MAIN] Attached to CanBusService (DRV)")

        ' Extended 세션 진입
        If Not CanBusService.EnterExtendedSeat(CanBusService.SeatTarget.Driver, 1500, 2) Then
            Appendlog("[SESS][Driver] 10 03 fail")
            Return False
        End If

        ' 초기 TesterPresent (suppress 금지로 한 번 확인)
        CanBusService.SendTesterPresentSeat(CanBusService.SeatTarget.Driver, False)
        Threading.Thread.Sleep(50)

        ' KeepAlive 시작 (suppress 허용)
        CanBusService.StartKeepAlive(1000, True)
        Appendlog("[DRV] SessionStart completed OK")
        Return True

    End Function

    ' ===== 보조석 세션 시작 (필요 시) =====
    Public Function SessionStart_Ast() As Boolean
        If Not FlagCanInit Then
            Appendlog("[AST] CAN not initialized")
            Return False
        End If

        CanBusService.StopKeepAlive()
        Threading.Thread.Sleep(30)

        CanBusService.SelectTarget(CanBusService.SeatTarget.Assistant)
        Threading.Thread.Sleep(10)

        CanBusService.Attach(mChannel, &H5E5US, &H5EDUS, fd:=True, brs:=True, testerKeepAliveMs:=1000, suppressPosResp:=True)
        Appendlog("[MAIN] Attached to CanBusService (AST)")

        If Not CanBusService.EnterExtendedSeat(CanBusService.SeatTarget.Assistant, 1500, 2) Then
            Appendlog("[SESS][Assistant] 10 03 fail")
            Return False
        End If

        CanBusService.SendTesterPresentSeat(CanBusService.SeatTarget.Assistant, False)
        Threading.Thread.Sleep(50)

        CanBusService.StartKeepAlive(1000, True)
        Appendlog("[AST] SessionStart completed OK")
        Return True
    End Function

    Private Sub OnCanLog(ByVal line As String)
        ' 네 UI 로그창으로 출력
        Appendlog(line)
    End Sub

    Private Function PayloadToAscii(bytesArr As Byte()) As String
        If bytesArr Is Nothing OrElse bytesArr.Length = 0 Then Return String.Empty

        ' 뒤쪽 패딩 제거
        Dim endIdx As Integer = bytesArr.Length - 1
        While endIdx >= 0 AndAlso (bytesArr(endIdx) = &H0 OrElse bytesArr(endIdx) = &HAA)
            endIdx -= 1
        End While
        If endIdx < 0 Then Return String.Empty

        Dim sb As New System.Text.StringBuilder(endIdx + 1)
        For i As Integer = 0 To endIdx
            Dim b As Byte = bytesArr(i)
            If b >= &H20 AndAlso b <= &H7E Then
                sb.Append(ChrW(b))
            End If
        Next
        Return sb.ToString()
    End Function

    Private Sub OnUdsCompleted(ByVal respId As UInteger, ByVal uds() As Byte)
        If uds Is Nothing OrElse uds.Length < 3 Then Exit Sub

        Dim sid As Byte = uds(0)
        If sid <> &H62 Then Exit Sub

        Dim did As UShort = CUShort((CUShort(uds(1)) << 8) Or uds(2))
        Dim payload As Byte() = uds.Skip(3).ToArray()
        Dim txt As String = PayloadToAscii(payload)

        ' UI 스레드로 작업을 위임 (BeginInvoke 사용)
        Me.BeginInvoke(CType(Sub()
                                 Select Case did
                                     Case &HF187US ' Part Number
                                         Appendlog($"[MAIN ASU] PART NO(F187): {txt}")
                                         If srclbCanPartNO IsNot Nothing Then srclbCanPartNO.Text = txt

                                     Case &HF191US ' HW Number
                                         Appendlog($"[MAIN ASU] HW Number(F191): {txt}")
                                         If srclbCanHwNo IsNot Nothing Then srclbCanHwNo.Text = txt

                                     Case &HF193US ' HW Version
                                         Appendlog($"[MAIN ASU] HW Version(F193): {txt}")
                                         If srclbCanHwVer IsNot Nothing Then srclbCanHwVer.Text = txt

                                     Case &HF1B1US ' SW Version
                                         Appendlog($"[MAIN ASU] SW Version(F1B1): {txt}")
                                         If srclbCanSwVer IsNot Nothing Then srclbCanSwVer.Text = txt
                                 End Select
                             End Sub, MethodInvoker))
    End Sub

    ' ===== 유틸 =====
    Private Sub Appendlog(msg As String)

        If msg.Contains("3E 80") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("[TP][Driver]") Then Return
        If msg.Contains("[PCAN][TX-KA]") Then Exit Sub

        If Me.IsDisposed Then Return
        If Me.InvokeRequired Then
            ' ★ 비동기: UI가 바쁠 땐 큐에만 넣고 즉시 리턴 -> 수신 스레드가 안 막힘
            Me.BeginInvoke(CType(Sub() Appendlog(msg), MethodInvoker))
            Return
        End If
        ' 실제 UI 업데이트
        TextBox1.AppendText(msg & Environment.NewLine)
    End Sub

    Private Const CTRL_STOP As Byte = &H0
    Private Const CTRL_DEFLATE As Byte = &H1
    Private Const CTRL_INFLATE As Byte = &H2
    Private Const CTRL_START As Byte = &H3

    Private Const LO_F011_UpperInflate As Byte = &H11
    Private Const LO_F012_UpperDeflate As Byte = &H12
    Private Const LO_F013_MiddleInflate As Byte = &H13
    Private Const LO_F014_MiddleDeflate As Byte = &H14
    Private Const LO_F015_LowerInflate As Byte = &H15
    Private Const LO_F016_LowerDeflate As Byte = &H16
    Private Const LO_F017_BolsterInflate As Byte = &H17
    Private Const LO_F018_BolsterDeflate As Byte = &H18

    ' ==============================
    ' AST SIDE
    ' ==============================
    Public Function Bolster_Inflate_Start_Ast() As Boolean
        Dim ok As Boolean = CanBusService.SendIocbiAst(LO_F017_BolsterInflate, CTRL_START)
        Appendlog("[AST] Bolster Inflate Start " & If(ok, "OK", "Fail"))
        Return ok
    End Function
    Public Function Bolster_Deflate_Start_Ast() As Boolean
        Dim ok As Boolean = CanBusService.SendIocbiAst(LO_F018_BolsterDeflate, CTRL_START)
        Appendlog("[AST] Bolster Deflate Start " & If(ok, "OK", "Fail"))
        Return ok
    End Function
    Public Function Bolster_Stop_Ast() As Boolean
        Dim ok1 As Boolean = CanBusService.SendIocbiAst(LO_F017_BolsterInflate, CTRL_STOP)
        Thread.Sleep(60)
        Dim ok2 As Boolean = CanBusService.SendIocbiAst(LO_F018_BolsterDeflate, CTRL_STOP)
        Dim result As Boolean = ok1 AndAlso ok2
        Appendlog("[AST] Bolster Stop " & If(result, "OK", "Fail"))
        Return result
    End Function

    ' ==============================
    ' DRV SIDE
    ' ==============================
    Public Function Bolster_Inflate_Start_Drv() As Boolean
        Dim ok As Boolean = CanBusService.SendIocbiDrv(LO_F017_BolsterInflate, CTRL_START)
        Appendlog("[DRV] Bolster Inflate Start " & If(ok, "OK", "Fail"))
        Return ok
    End Function
    Public Enum SeatSide
        Assistant
        Driver
    End Enum
    Public Enum ZoneType
        Bolster
        LumbarUpper
        LumbarMiddle
        LumbarLower
    End Enum
    Public Enum MotionType
        mInflate
        mDeflate
        mStop
    End Enum
    Public Function RunIocbi(side As SeatSide, zone As ZoneType, motion As MotionType) As Boolean
        Dim loInflate As Byte = 0
        Dim loDeflate As Byte = 0
        Dim tag As String = If(side = SeatSide.Driver, "DRV", "AST")
        Dim zoneName As String = zone.ToString()
        Dim result As Boolean = False

        ' 구역별 F0 매핑
        Select Case zone
            Case ZoneType.Bolster
                loInflate = &H17 : loDeflate = &H18
            Case ZoneType.LumbarUpper
                loInflate = &H11 : loDeflate = &H12
            Case ZoneType.LumbarMiddle
                loInflate = &H13 : loDeflate = &H14
            Case ZoneType.LumbarLower
                loInflate = &H15 : loDeflate = &H16
            Case Else
                Appendlog($"[{tag}] Zone 미지정 → {zoneName}")
                Return False
        End Select

        ' 동작 분기
        Select Case motion
            Case MotionType.mInflate
                result = SendIo(side, loInflate, CTRL_START)
                Appendlog($"[{tag}] {zoneName} Inflate {(If(result, "성공", "실패"))}")

            Case MotionType.mDeflate
                result = SendIo(side, loDeflate, CTRL_START)
                Appendlog($"[{tag}] {zoneName} Deflate {(If(result, "성공", "실패"))}")

            Case MotionType.mStop
                Dim ok1 As Boolean = SendIo(side, loInflate, CTRL_STOP)
                Threading.Thread.Sleep(60)
                Dim ok2 As Boolean = SendIo(side, loDeflate, CTRL_STOP)
                result = ok1 AndAlso ok2
                Appendlog($"[{tag}] {zoneName} Stop {(If(result, "성공", "실패"))}")

            Case Else
                Appendlog($"[{tag}] Motion 미지정")
                Return False
        End Select

        Return result
    End Function
    Private Function SendIo(side As SeatSide, lo As Byte, ctrl As Byte) As Boolean
        Dim ok As Boolean
        If side = SeatSide.Driver Then
            ok = CanBusService.SendIocbiDrv(lo, ctrl)
        Else
            ok = CanBusService.SendIocbiAst(lo, ctrl)
        End If

        Dim tag As String = If(side = SeatSide.Driver, "DRV", "AST")
        Appendlog(String.Format("[{0}] IO F0{1:X2} Ctrl={2:X2} {3}", tag, lo, ctrl, If(ok, "OK", "Fail")))
        Return ok
    End Function

    ' VisionSocketPort 컬럼이 Table_SET에 없으면 추가
    Private Sub CheckAndAddVisionSocketPortColumn()
        Try
            ConnectionOpenMDB()
            Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_SET", MdbConnect, ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic, ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic)

            ' 컬럼 존재 여부 확인
            Dim columnExists As Boolean = False
            For i As Integer = 0 To Rs.Fields.Count - 1
                If Rs.Fields(i).Name.ToUpper() = "VISIONSOCKETPORT" Then
                    columnExists = True
                    Exit For
                End If
            Next

            Rs.Close()
            Rs = Nothing

            ' 컬럼이 없으면 추가
            If Not columnExists Then
                MdbConnect.Execute("ALTER TABLE Table_SET ADD VisionSocketPort INTEGER DEFAULT 5000")
                MdbConnect.Execute("UPDATE Table_SET SET VisionSocketPort = 5000")
                Appendlog("VisionSocketPort 컬럼 추가됨")
            End If

            ConnectionCloseMDB()
        Catch ex As Exception
            Appendlog("CheckAndAddVisionSocketPortColumn Error: " & ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

' --- [헤드레스트 섹션: 모터 구동 (기존 로직 유지)] ---
            ElseIf wStep = 210 Then
                Appendlog("헤드레스트 하강 검사 시작")
                stats.Reset()
                If OptionPos1 = "LH" Then
                    srclbHrestUpAmpDec.Text = "NA"
                    srclbHrestUpAmpDec.BackColor = Color.Green
                    srclbHrestDownAmpDec.Text = "NA"
                    srclbHrestDownAmpDec.BackColor = Color.Green
                    srclbHrestUpNoiseDec.Text = "NA"
                    srclbHrestUpNoiseDec.BackColor = Color.Green
                    srclbHrestDownNoiseDec.Text = "NA"
                    srclbHrestDownNoiseDec.BackColor = Color.Green
                    wStep = 300
                    TmrWork.Start() ' --- [수정] --- 제어권 반환
                ElseIf OptionPos1 = "RH" Then
                    DoOn(2)
                    sw.Restart()
                    wStep = 211
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 211 Then
                TotalTime = sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                Try
                    ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(ZedGraphHeadAmp, 1, ValueAmp2, TotalTime)
                    ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(ZedGraphHeadNoise, 1, ValueNoise, TotalTime)
                Catch ex As Exception
                End Try
                stats.Push(TotalTime, ValueAmp2, ValueNoise, ReclSector)
                If ValueAmp2 > 2 And TotalTime > 1 Then
                    If OptionPos1 = "LH" Then
                        DoOff(2)
                    ElseIf OptionPos1 = "RH" Then
                        DoOff(2)
                    End If
                    wStep = 212
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 212 Then
                DecideControl(srclbHrestDownAmpVal, srclbHrestDownAmpDec, 0.5, 2, If(stats.MoveAmpMax = Double.MinValue, 0, stats.MoveAmpMax))
                DecideControl(srclbHrestDownNoiseVal, srclbHrestDownNoiseDec, 0, 55, If(stats.MoveNoiseMax = Double.MinValue, 0, stats.MoveNoiseMax))
                Appendlog("헤드레스트 하강 검사 종료")
                wStep = 213

            ElseIf wStep = 213 Then '헤드레스트 상승
                Appendlog("헤드레스트 상승 검사 시작")
                stats.Reset()
                If OptionPos1 = "LH" Then
                    DoOn(3)
                ElseIf OptionPos1 = "RH" Then
                    DoOn(3)
                End If
                sw.Restart()
                wStep = 214

            ElseIf wStep = 214 Then
                TotalTime = sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                Try
                    ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(ZedGraphHeadAmp, 0, ValueAmp2, TotalTime)
                    ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(ZedGraphHeadNoise, 0, ValueNoise, TotalTime)
                Catch ex As Exception
                End Try
                stats.Push(TotalTime, ValueAmp2, ValueNoise, ReclSector)
                If ValueAmp2 > 2 And TotalTime > 1 Then
                    If OptionPos1 = "LH" Then
                        DoOff(3)
                    ElseIf OptionPos1 = "RH" Then
                        DoOff(3)
                    End If
                    wStep = 215
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 215 Then
                DecideControl(srclbHrestUpAmpVal, srclbHrestUpAmpDec, 0.5, 2, If(stats.MoveAmpMax = Double.MinValue, 0, stats.MoveAmpMax))
                DecideControl(srclbHrestUpNoiseVal, srclbHrestUpNoiseDec, 0, 55, If(stats.MoveNoiseMax = Double.MinValue, 0, stats.MoveNoiseMax))
                Appendlog("헤드레스트 상승 검사 종료")
                wStep = 300
                TmrWork.Start() ' --- [수정] --- 제어권 반환
            End If

﻿Imports System.Net.Sockets

Imports TPCANHandle = System.UInt16
Imports TPCANBitrateFD = System.String
Imports TPCANTimestampFD = System.UInt64

Public Class FrmMain

    ' MX Component ActiveX - 디자이너 깨짐 방지를 위해 코드에서 동적 생성
    Private WithEvents ActPlc As AxACTETHERLib.AxActQNUDECPUTCP

    ' 비전 소켓 서버
    Private WithEvents VisionServer As New VisionSocketServer

    Private noiseCurve As LineItem
    Private rolling As RollingPointPairList
    Private specMinLine As LineObj
    Private specMaxLine As LineObj
    Private specBand As BoxObj

    Private ReadOnly pointsCapacity As Integer = 3000
    Private ReadOnly feedHz As Integer = 20
    Private specMin As Double = 25.0
    Private specMax As Double = 45.0
    Private yMin As Double = 0
    Private yMax As Double = 80
    Private rollingWindowSec As Double = 60

    Private maxValue As Double = Double.MinValue
    Private maxTime As Double = 0.0
    Private peakText As TextObj
    Private peakMarker As LineObj

    Private Sub ShowBasicData()

        '° Ω ±

        srclbReclFwdAmpDiffSpec.Text = CStr(BAsicReclFWdDiffMin) & " ~ " & CStr(BAsicReclFWdDiffMax) & " A"
        srclbReclBwdAmpDiffSpec.Text = CStr(BAsicReclBWdDiffMin) & " ~ " & CStr(BAsicReclBWdDiffMax) & " A"

        srclbReclFwdStartAmpSpec.Text = CStr(BasicReclFwdStartAmpMin) & " ~ " & CStr(BasicReclFwdStartAmpMax) & " A"
        srclbReclFwdMovingAmpSpec.Text = CStr(BasicReclFwdMovingAmpMin) & " ~ " & CStr(BasicReclFwdMovingAmpMax) & " A"
        srclbReclBwdStartAmpSpec.Text = CStr(BasicReclBwdStartAmpMin) & " ~ " & CStr(BasicReclBwdStartAmpMax) & " A"
        srclbReclBwdMovingAmpSpec.Text = CStr(BasicReclBwdMovingAmpMin) & " ~ " & CStr(BasicReclBwdMovingAmpMax) & " A"

        srclbReclFwdStartNoiseSpec.Text = CStr(BasicReclFwdStartNoiseMin) & " ~ " & CStr(BasicReclFwdStartNoiseMax) & " dB"
        srclbReclFwdMovingNoiseSpec.Text = CStr(BasicReclFwdMovingNoiseMin) & " ~ " & CStr(BasicReclFwdMovingNoiseMax) & " dB"
        srclbReclBwdStartNoiseSpec.Text = CStr(BasicReclBwdStartNoiseMin) & " ~ " & CStr(BasicReclBwdStartNoiseMax) & " dB"
        srclbReclBwdMovingNoiseSpec.Text = CStr(BasicReclBwdMovingNoiseMin) & " ~ " & CStr(BasicReclBwdMovingNoiseMax) & " dB"

        srclbReclFwdAngleSpec.Text = CStr(BasicReclFwdAngleMin) & " ~ " & CStr(BasicReclFwdAngleMax) & " °"
        srclbReclBwdAngleSpec.Text = CStr(BasicReclBwdAngleMin) & " ~ " & CStr(BasicReclBwdAngleMax) & " °"
        srclbReclEndAngleSpec.Text = CStr(BasicReclEndAngleMin) & " ~ " & CStr(BasicReclEndAngleMax) & " °"
        srclbReclFwdSpeedSpec.Text = CStr(BasicReclFwdSpeedMin) & " ~ " & CStr(BasicReclFwdSpeedMax) & " °/s"
        srclbReclBwdSpeedSpec.Text = CStr(BasicReclBwdSpeedMin) & " ~ " & CStr(BasicReclBwdSpeedMax) & " °/s"

        srclbLsuptUpperInfNoiseSpec.Text = "0" & " ~ " & "55" & " dB"
        srclbLsuptMiddleInfNoiseSpec.Text = "0" & " ~ " & "55" & " dB"
        srclbLsuptLowerInfNoiseSpec.Text = "0" & " ~ " & "55" & " dB"

        srclbLsuptUpperDefNoiseSpec.Text = "0" & " ~ " & "55" & " dB"
        srclbLsuptMiddleDefNoiseSpec.Text = "0" & " ~ " & "55" & " dB"
        srclbLsuptLowerDefNoiseSpec.Text = "0" & " ~ " & "55" & " dB"

        srclbLsuptUpperInfAmpSpec.Text = "0" & " ~ " & "1" & " A"
        srclbLsuptMiddleInfAmpSpec.Text = "0" & " ~ " & "1" & " A"
        srclbLsuptLowerInfAmpSpec.Text = "0" & " ~ " & "1" & " A"

        srclbLsuptUpperdefAmpSpec.Text = "0" & " ~ " & "1" & " A"
        srclbLsuptMiddledefAmpSpec.Text = "0" & " ~ " & "1" & " A"
        srclbLsuptLowerdefAmpSpec.Text = "0" & " ~ " & "1" & " A"

        srclbBolsterInfNoiseSpec.Text = "0" & " ~ " & "55" & " dB"
        srclbBolsterDefNoiseSpec.Text = "0" & " ~ " & "55" & " dB"
        srclbBolsterInfAmpSpec.Text = "0" & " ~ " & "1" & " A"
        srclbBolsterDefAmpSpec.Text = "0" & " ~ " & "1" & " A"

        srclbHrestUpNoiseSpec.Text = "0" & " ~ " & "55" & " dB"
        srclbHrestDownNoiseSpec.Text = "0" & " ~ " & "55" & " dB"
        srclbHrestUpAmpSpec.Text = "0.5" & " ~ " & "2" & " A"
        srclbHrestDownAmpSpec.Text = "0.5" & " ~ " & "2" & " A"

        'If OptionLsupt = "7CELL" Then
